name: node-is-plain-obj
title: node-is-plain-obj
summary: Check if a value is a plain object
description:
Check if a value is a plain object
An object is plain if it's created by either `{}`, `new Object()` or
`Object.create(null)`.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.

When validating lab setup, run `node-is-plain-obj --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
